name: @speedora/composition-intelligence
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Composition Intelligence, Batch RB-1 - a COMPOSITE signal derived from Facial/Object Intelligence's already-computed primary-subject bounding boxes (selected upstream by the worker orchestrator's Primary Subject Selection order, see docs/ai/composition-intelligence.md), not a fresh detector/subprocess of its own. calculateRuleOfThirdsScore/calculateHeadroomScore/calculateLeadRoomScore/calculateCenteringScore/calculateSubjectLossRatio/calculateCompositionStability/calculateFramingConsistency are independently exported and testable; deriveCompositionFeatures() orchestrates them. No DB/queue access at all; see root ARCHITECTURE.md. Consumed by apps/worker's render-clip adapter and @speedora/fusion-engine (Batch RB-2, not wired yet).
